page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Bedtk is a set of simple tools to process BED files.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Bedtk is a set of simple tools to process BED files. It so far implements intersection, subtraction, sorting, merging and computing the breadth of coverage.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Bedtk is a set of simple tools to process BED files. It so far implements intersection, subtraction, sorting, merging and computing the breadth of coverage.
